action.reasoning: Observation: Iter_6 achieved 44.2% success rate with the Dict-observation CNN extractor (5M steps). Several environments remain at 0% (KeyCorridor, LockedRoom, UnlockPickup, MultiRoom) and FourRooms is only 12%. These are larger, harder exploration tasks. Analysis: The policy likely lacks temporal memory and sufficient capacity/model size to solve multi-room/key tasks. Increasing network size (features_dim 256→512, net_arch [512,256]) and adding a 4-frame observation stack will provide short-term memory (motion, door toggling) while keeping total parameters well under 10M. I will also increase n_steps to 4096 for lower-variance updates on longer episodes, and train for 15M total timesteps (~2.5h based on 5M≈42min). This should push success rate significantly higher. Decision: Update wrappers.py to add FrameStackWrapper, update model.py to handle stacked channels, update train.py and predict.py to use the new wrapper, then launch a 15M-step training run.
